---
name: Suggest a new section
about: Propose adding a new top-level CV subtask or vertical section
title: "[Section] <section name>"
labels: new-section
---

## Proposed section name

## What CV subtask does it cover?

One paragraph. What problem does this section help engineers solve? How is it distinct from existing sections?

## Initial 3 Recommended picks

A section should not be created empty. Propose the initial 3 picks here with:
- Name + link.
- One-line *why*.
- *When to avoid*.

If you can't name 3 defensible picks, the section isn't ready yet — consider adding these to an existing section's Dump first.

## Why not just add to an existing section?

Explain why this is a top-level section, not a sub-topic of an existing one.
